method: Static census of runtime persistence: grep better-sqlite3 / fs.write* / data-path across lib + pages/api, then trace each store to its runtime caller (API route / server loader). Non-test only.
criticalFinding: Five production API routes persist customer or telemetry state to LOCAL better-sqlite3 files under data/. On serverless (Netlify/Vercel) each invocation gets a fresh ephemeral filesystem: writes are lost, never shared across instances, not concurrency-safe. This is 'local proof mistaken for production durability' — the controlling-mission #1 risk, PRESENT.

requiredConditions.note: PRODUCTION_FILESYSTEM_STATE and SILENT_LOCAL_FALLBACK must reach 0 before a PASS. They are non-zero today.

stores.productionAuthority: MISSING (consent must be durable + auditable → Postgres)
MISSING (telemetry sink should be Postgres or an analytics pipe)

stores.capability: Interaction spine durable store (compounding twin) — env-gated
stores.currentAdapter: better-sqlite3 ONLY when INTERACTION_STORE_PATH is set; else resolver returns null (binding no-ops, product flow unaffected)
stores.serverlessSafe: safe-by-default (no-ops without the env; never silently writes ephemeral state in prod)
stores.productionAuthority: would bind to Postgres adapter in a full deploy (documented in persistence-authority-adr)

stores.capability: Decision graph / watchdog / analytics / recommendation durable stores
stores.serverlessSafe: n/a — no runtime API caller (tests only)
stores.severity: OK (but must be guarded so a future API import fails the serverless gate)

otherRuntimeFilesystemWriters.note: Additional lib modules call fs.write*/mkdir at runtime and need individual classification in a follow-up pass (many are PDF generation to tmp, diagnostics local-storage adapters, or dev-only). Not yet dispositioned.

remediationOrder: 1. Fail-closed guard: sqlite runtime stores throw in NODE_ENV=production unless ALLOW_SQLITE_RUNTIME is explicitly set (kills silent local fallback).
2. Migrate pilot intake + consent to Prisma/Postgres (customer/consent state first).
3. Migrate funnel + recommendation-context to Postgres (or an analytics pipe for funnel).
4. Static serverless guard test: no NEW production API route may import a LOCAL_FILE_SQLITE store.
